Nice tuck and roll job, eh?: He appears to be chasing someone!

這一滾摔得挺專業的嘛，齁？: 哇塞，老爸，這是台 Wurlitzer 唱片機耶！

Nice tuck and roll job, eh?: It's an antique, left over from "King's Quest III."
這一滾摔得挺專業的嘛，齁？: 這是古董，是《King's Quest III》留下來的。

Nice tuck and roll job, eh?: You don't know much about art, but you do know what you like!
這一滾摔得挺專業的嘛，齁？: 你不太懂藝術，但你知道自己喜歡啥！

Nice tuck and roll job, eh?: You wonder what palace of earthly delights resides above you.
這一滾摔得挺專業的嘛，齁？: 你好奇樓上到底藏著什麼人間享樂殿堂。

Nice tuck and roll job, eh?: There is a fire escape outside the window.
The clothesline is barely strong enough to hold its present load. Poor girl, you'd think at these prices she could afford a laundromat.
這一滾摔得挺專業的嘛，齁？: 曬衣繩快撐不住上頭那些行頭了。可憐的姑娘，論她收的價碼，應該請得起洗衣店吧。

Nice tuck and roll job, eh?: You see alleys stretching off to infinity.
這一滾摔得挺專業的嘛，齁？: 你看見小巷一路延伸到天邊。

Nice tuck and roll job, eh?: He sure drives fast, doesn't he?

這一滾摔得挺專業的嘛，齁？: 顯然，那傢伙自認為很幽默！

Nice tuck and roll job, eh?: They almost look real, don't they?
這一滾摔得挺專業的嘛，齁？: 看起來還挺像真的，對吧？

Nice tuck and roll job, eh?: Evidently, this exit is for employees only. You'd better use the elevator.
這一滾摔得挺專業的嘛，齁？: 很顯然這個出口只給員工用,你還是乖乖搭電梯吧。

Nice tuck and roll job, eh?: You can barely tell they're made from pressed sawdust.
這一滾摔得挺專業的嘛，齁？: 你幾乎看不出來，這些東西是用壓縮木屑做的。

Nice tuck and roll job, eh?: You can't see through the "stained glass" windows. They're fake, like everything else about this place.
這一滾摔得挺專業的嘛，齁？: 你看不穿這些「彩繪玻璃」窗——反正也是假的，跟這地方其他東西一樣。

Nice tuck and roll job, eh?: The shelves are filled with all the necessities of life: "Dwinkies," "Wallo-Wars," "Loritos," various colas, cheap wine, and coffee. You don't see anything you really need in this part of the store.
這一滾摔得挺專業的嘛，齁？: 架上擺滿了人生必需品：「多多餅」、「哇哇戰士」、「辣多滋」，還有各式可樂、廉價紅酒和咖啡。這一區沒有你真正需要的東西。

Nice tuck and roll job, eh?: Isn't it funny how there's so little traffic?
這一滾摔得挺專業的嘛，齁？: 說也奇怪，怎麼車這麼少？
